_meta.keyKnowledge: We learn how non-religious, religious and spiritual communities create belonging and inclusion for their members.

_source.w: We learn how non-religious, religious and spiritual communities create belonging and inclusion for their members.
y: Understanding how different communities create belonging helps us respect all belief systems.
Belonging to a community of shared values provides support, meaning and identity.
This knowledge helps us participate respectfully in a world of diverse beliefs.
eg: We learn about how different religious communities gather, celebrate and support each other.
We explore how non-religious communities create belonging through shared values and activities.
We investigate how spiritual practices connect people to something larger than themselves.
We discuss what makes someone feel included in a community.
We compare how different communities welcome new members.
We explore how communities of different beliefs can coexist respectfully.
